name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ This Dionysus handbag from the 2023 Early Autumn collection is presented in a mini silhouette, crafted from white leather and cleverly incorporating the brand's beloved 3D tiger head buckle. Classic accessories are updated with crystal elements, injecting a unique touch of luxury into the design and showcasing the contrast between different textures.
name_cn:
(With full set of packaging)!!️ This Dionysus handbag from the 2023 Early Autumn collection is presented in a mini silhouette, crafted from white leather and cleverly incorporating the brand's beloved 3D tiger head buckle. Model: 752029
Size: 18*12*6cm
Color: White Original Leather。
